Name: FViewTargetTransitionParams
Description: A set of parameters to describe how to transition between view targets.

Variables.Name: BlendTime
Variables.Description: Total duration of blend to pending view target. 0 means no blending.

Variables.Name: BlendFunction
Variables.Description: Function to apply to the blend parameter.

Variables.Name: BlendExp
Variables.Description: Exponent, used by certain blend functions to control the shape of the curve.

Variables.Name: bLockOutgoing
Variables.Description:
If true, lock outgoing viewtarget to last frame's camera POV for the remainder of the blend.
	  This is useful if you plan to teleport the old viewtarget, but don't want to affect the blend.
